validation_checks.name: delivery_builders_nonzero
validation_checks.description: Delivery data contains a non-trivial number of distinct builders for fingerprinting

validation_checks.name: bid_builders_nonzero
validation_checks.description: Bid trace data contains a non-trivial number of distinct builders for fingerprinting

validation_checks.name: fingerprint_dimensions_sufficient
validation_checks.description: At least 5 distinct fingerprint dimensions are extractable from the available data fields
validation_checks.value: 8 dimensions: market share, relay routing breadth, relay routing HHI, mean block value, value variance, gas utilization, bid intensity, num_tx

validation_checks.name: archetype_classification_feasible
validation_checks.description: Builder population and dimension count support meaningful clustering into behavioral archetypes
validation_checks.value: 47 builders x 8 dimensions supports 4-5 cluster archetypes

validation_checks.name: limitations_documented
validation_checks.description: Evidence explicitly documents data limitations including date mismatch, single-day windows, and identity ambiguity
validation_checks.value: 6 caveats documented: date mismatch, single-day, identity, no MEV attribution, aggregate-only, field availability
